title: Janus Beta Telemetry Logging Privacy Hardening
route: TEST SKILL SECURITY -> custom telemetry privacy runner -> SKILL 7

deploymentModel.rawSensitiveEvidencePolicy: Never write raw secrets, private prompt canaries, file-content canaries, cookies or bearer tokens to result evidence.

compilerStatus.reason: Spec 14 requires runtime log emission, privacy redaction checks and cross-sink configuration inspection.

cases.expectedEvidence: Telemetry sink map with owners and retention notes
Backend/frontend Sentry PII and replay privacy controls
Production sampling rates are conservative or disabled
Synthetic secrets are redacted by shared logging filter
Private prompt/file canaries are redacted in local context telemetry logs
Runtime error/auth/debug responses do not expose stack traces or private payloads
Log access model documented for local and provider sinks
Security-relevant event shape exists without raw payload
No open Critical/High telemetry privacy findings
